name: MBD4 ATR evidence matrix v2 (canonical receipt)

verbatim_evidence.claim: {"id": "receipt:mbd4_atr_evidence_matrix_v2", "type": "canonical_receipt", "name": "MBD4 \u00d7 ATR/WEE1 evidence matrix (v2)", "what_it_solves": "The canonical evidence receipt for the MBD4 \u00d7 ATR/WEE1 axis \u2014 the highest-stakes claim CrisPRO makes for this bundle.", "how_it_solves": "Structured JSON with one modality_cell per evidence source (CRISPR co-dependency, CRISPR MSI-stratified, PRISM, GDSC2, TCGA-OV, UCEC survival, pan-cancer LOF, dependency probability). Each cell has a verdict + why-it-does-not-support-STRONG. The overall_verdict block is the ground truth for the tier stat
